name: helmguild-plugins-public
description: Public, community-licensed plugins for helmguild mentors — open AgentSkills bundled per the Claude Code plugin spec. The sibling private/commercial marketplace lives at helmut-hoffer-von-ankershoffen/helmguild-plugins.

plugins.name: pepe-knowledge-management
plugins.description: Agent + human knowledge management: the shared canonical Markdown vault every other playbook depends on, per-agent auto-memory discipline, daily learning extraction from chat history, cross-agent shared memory when a human operates multiple isolated agents, quarterly vault coherence + drift audit. Foundation playbook — every other Pepe playbook depends on it. Free + open: CC-BY-4.0 skill bodies, MIT bundled scripts.
